title: YouTube Videos in HTML
content:
### Embedding YouTube Videos --- ### Using an ` ``` --- ### Getting the Video ID From a YouTube URL: ``` URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ ID: dQw4w9WgXcQ ``` Just take the part after `v=` and put it in the embed URL. --- ### YouTube Parameters Add parameters to the embed URL: | Parameter | Value | Effect | |-----------|-------|--------| | `autoplay=1` | 1 or 0 | Auto-play video | | `mute=1` | 1 or 0 | Mute (required with autoplay) | | `loop=1` | 1 or 0 | Loop the video | | `controls=0` | 1 or 0 | Hide controls | | `rel=0` | 1 or 0 | Limit related videos | | `start=30` | Seconds | Start at 30 seconds | ```html ``` --- ### Responsive YouTube Embed ```html
``` --- > **Pro Tip:** Always use `allowfullscreen`, `title` (accessibility), and `https://` in the embed URL. The `rel=0` parameter helps keep users on your site by limiting related YouTube videos.
codeExample:
<iframe width="560" height="315"
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ"
  title="YouTube video"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write;
         encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>

quiz.question: What element is used to embed YouTube videos?
